title: SQLancer crash on complex join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b VARCHAR, c BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE), (2, 'example', NULL), (3, 'sample', FALSE);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b, CAST(c AS VARCHAR) AS c_str FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(v1.a, 0) + COALESCE(CAST(t1.b AS INT), 0)) FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON (v1.c_str LIKE '%' || t1.b || '%');
CREATE TABLE t2(x DOUBLE, y DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
key_bug_features: full outer join with complex view and cast operations
